Because here’s the reality: The right to vote is fundamental, and it should be accessible and secure. Every vote should count. But those things don’t hold unless people are actively defending them where they’re being tested. In 2024, Voting Rights Fund backed dozens of candidates in competitive races. And in over 60% of those races, the candidates we supported won. That’s not by accident. It’s because we focus on the races where the outcome actually shapes how voting works. I'll be straight with you...
I stood on the Capitol steps on January 6th. I saw what that mob was capable of. I decided then that someone had to step up and fight back -- not just in the streets, but in the halls of Congress.
That's why I'm running -- _and that 's why tomorrow's fundraising deadline matters so much to me._
My primary in MD-05 is crowded, my opponents are self-funding, and ads are flooding the airwaves.
**But I 'm not a millionaire, and I refuse to take a penny from corporate PACs -- so if I'm going to stay competitive in this race, I need grassroots donors like you (yes, you!) to dig deep and chip in.**
#### **[We set an ambitious goal of raising $500,000 before the end of April, and we still need another $17,039 to get there. Can I count on you to chip in a few dollars before midnight tomorrow?](https://substack.com/redirect/7eb48a97-6415-4423-936f-fc0398e61aaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
This race is bigger than MD-05.
Every day Trump is in Washington without real congressional oversight is another day he operates without accountability. I've seen firsthand what happens when people in power think no one is watching -- and I'm not willing to let that continue.
**If we win here, we win a seat at the table.** A real one. A vote on legislation that protects your healthcare, your rights, your paycheck. A voice in a chamber that's been ignoring the needs of the American people for too long.
**But if we lose, we risk Republicans EXPANDING their narrow majority and wreaking more havoc on our country.**
#### **[The stakes have never been higher... So please, rush whatever you can before our End-of-Month deadline to help us win this race and flip the House blue:](https://substack.com/redirect/7eb48a97-6415-4423-936f-fc0398e61aaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[CHIP IN](https://substack.com/redirect/7eb48a97-6415-4423-936f-fc0398e61aaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's win this thing,
Harry

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Exactly how Trump uses mail-in ballots to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Here are the details on how Donald Trump -- while in Florida -- voted by mail and played golf instead of voting in-person ahead of a 2026 special election, straight from Politico:
" Trump requested his mail-in ballot on Saturday, March 14, according to public Palm Beach County voter records. The ballot was sent to Trump’s Mar-a-Lago estate the same day and was received for processing the next day, on Sunday, March 15.
T he president was in Palm Beach both days, at his golf club from 8:45 a.m. to 2:37 p.m. on Saturday, and 9:21 a.m. to 1:55 p.m. on Sunday, according to press pool reports. In-person early voting was open from Saturday, March 14 through Sunday, March 22 at 7 p.m. "
Listen, we hate asking for money in every email. Unlike opponents of voting rights, however, there are no secret wealthy donors backing our efforts. There are just our supporters, kicking in $5, $15, or $35 whenever they can. Please chip in today if you can and help us defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=042826_4&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
AP: Trump casts Florida mail ballot as he pushes Congress to severely limit that voting option [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=042826_4&amount=25]
Team: Donald Trump voted by mail. No, we're not referring to his well-documented past usage of the practice.
No, after years of attacking vote-by-mail, countless late-night Truth Social rants, and several executive orders within the last year trying to end, or at least curtail, mail-in voting, Donald Trump voted by mail this week, in a Florida special election held on March 24, 2026 . He could have gone to an early voting site when he was at Mar-A-Lago the week before the election, but he chose to submit a mailed ballot instead, according to Palm Beach County voter records.
To be honest, we here at Voter Action Project are glad he did. We believe every eligible American deserves to vote in the manner that is easiest for them to participate. That's because we believe that the act of participation is the most important part, not what method you use to cast your ballot.
It's worth noting, however, how he's very willing to use this tool to help himself and make his own voice heard, but he wants to restrict it for everyone else if it seems like it might not benefit him. The pattern is completely clear, and his self-interest drives every decision and statement he makes about voting.
So next time you run into that anti-voting family member, friend, or neighbor, just let them know: Trump himself chose to skip voting in person while in Florida and voted by mail in 2026.
Onward,
The Voter Action Project Team
P.S. Just as a reminder, Voter Action Project is completely grassroots funded. We have no wealthy backers in the shadows, just regular people standing up for the right to vote and offering what they can, a little at a time. We'd be honored if you provided support today for our mission to increase voter participation across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=042826_4&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Here are the details on how Donald Trump -- while in Florida -- voted by mail and played golf instead of voting in-person ahead of a 2026 special election, straight from Politico: " Trump requested his mail-in ballot on Saturday, March 14, according to public Palm Beach County voter records. The ballot was sent to Trump’s Mar-a-Lago estate the same day and was received for processing the next day, on Sunday, March 15. T he president was in Palm Beach both days, at his golf club from 8:45 a.m. to 2:37 p.m. on Saturday, and 9:21 a.m. to 1:55 p.m. on Sunday, according to press pool reports. In-person early voting was open from Saturday, March 14 through Sunday, March 22 at 7 p.m. " Listen, we hate asking for money in every email. Unlike opponents of voting rights, however, there are no secret wealthy donors backing our efforts. There are just our supporters, kicking in $5, $15, or $35 whenever they can. Please chip in today if you can and help us defend our fundamental right to vote >> [] Voter Action Project [] AP: Trump casts Florida mail ballot as he pushes Congress to severely limit that voting option [] Team: Donald Trump voted by mail. No, we're not referring to his well-documented past usage of the practice. No, after years of attacking vote-by-mail, countless late-night Truth Social rants, and several executive orders within the last year trying to end, or at least curtail, mail-in voting, Donald Trump voted by mail this week, in a Florida special election held on March 24, 2026 . He could have gone to an early voting site when he was at Mar-A-Lago the week before the election, but he chose to submit a mailed ballot instead, according to Palm Beach County voter records. To be honest, we here at Voter Action Project are glad he did. We believe every eligible American deserves to vote in the manner that is easiest for them to participate. That's because we believe that the act of participation is the most important part, not what method you use to cast your ballot. It's worth noting, however, how he's very willing to use this tool to help himself and make his own voice heard, but he wants to restrict it for everyone else if it seems like it might not benefit him. The pattern is completely clear, and his self-interest drives every decision and statement he makes about voting. So next time you run into that anti-voting family member, friend, or neighbor, just let them know: Trump himself chose to skip voting in person while in Florida and voted by mail in 2026. Onward, The Voter Action Project Team P.S. Just as a reminder, Voter Action Project is completely grassroots funded. We have no wealthy backers in the shadows, just regular people standing up for the right to vote and offering what they can, a little at a time. name: Chris Pappas
subject: $17 million is a big number
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=6375%2E582294%2EWJskfQ ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=6375%2E582294%2EWJskfQ ]Chris Pappas for Senate

The top Republican Senate super PAC plans to spend $17 million in New
Hampshire to boost my opponent John Sununu.

Here’s what this means: Very soon there won’t be a quiet moment left on
Granite Staters’ airwaves. Whether you’re catching the local news, sitting
down for a Hulu binge after work, or just watching YouTube with your kids,
these pro-Sununu ads will be inescapable.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260428_2.3OKLNo&refcode=em20260428-2&t=1003&akid=6375%2E582294%2EWJskfQ ]I’ll need the help of this grassroots team to fight back. Can you chip
in $5 or any amount so we can stay competitive with this
onslaught of super PAC spending?

$17 million is a big number — and it’s the largest investment national
Republicans have made in our state in a decade.

You don’t see that kind of spending here unless they think they have a
real shot at flipping this seat.

And with this race, they do.

This will be the first open U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire in sixteen
years. Open seats are different. They draw more attention, more outside
money, and more pressure from national groups looking for an opportunity
to put their finger on the scale.

Republicans haven’t won a Senate race here since 2010 — the last time
there was an open seat. They see this as their best chance in years to
change that – and they’re investing accordingly.

But what’s happening here isn’t just about one seat.

The Senate majority could come down to a handful of states, and keeping
New Hampshire blue is the only way Democrats have a chance at flipping it.
With the MAGA movement shaping the direction of the GOP, that control
carries real consequences.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260428_2.3OKLNo&refcode=em20260428-2&t=1004&akid=6375%2E582294%2EWJskfQ ]There’s a lot at stake — and this is our chance to prove that Granite
Staters still value our independence and that New Hampshire is not for
sale. Will you chip in today to help keep New Hampshire blue?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260428_2.3OKLNo&amount=5&refcode=em20260428-2&t=1023&akid=6375%2E582294%2EWJskfQ ]Donate $5 »

Thank you,

Chris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6375%2E582294%2EWJskfQ

subject: An explanation

body:
I felt this responsibility deeply.
#
Peter,
At the end of this message, I’m going to ask you to **[make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103213?refcode=em20260428-10365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10365%2E614464%2E1zwchP)** But first, will you let me explain why your support is so important?
Frankly, running for Senate wasn’t part of the plan. I wanted to serve North Carolina from right here at home.
Seeing all of the chaos and horrors coming out of Washington, DC, I knew I had to do something. Folks had placed their trust in me throughout my career as a public servant to fight for them – and **I felt that responsibility deeply.**
This is a race I simply could not walk away from. It’s also one I know we can win.
Since launching our campaign, tens of thousands of people have joined our grassroots movement. I’m so grateful to count you as one of them, Peter.
**With a recent poll showing this race statistically tied, and far-right Republicans spending millions to defeat me, I need your help to keep up our momentum.**
**[Your contribution split between our campaign and State Democrats Committee of $15 will be put to work immediately to help us win in North Carolina and take back the Senate. Will you chip in?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103213?refcode=em20260428-10365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=2&akid=10365%2E614464%2E1zwchP)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Cooper Victory Fund and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103214?refcode=em20260428-10365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=10365%2E614464%2E1zwchP) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103214?refcode=em20260428-10365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=10365%2E614464%2E1zwchP) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103213?refcode=em20260428-10365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=10365%2E614464%2E1zwchP)

Roy Cooper

clean_body: Winning or losing in Minnesota could decide our chances of retaking the Senate majority. | = = Dr. Mary Trump here. Angie Craig told me I could reach out about her neck-and-neck race for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Listen, I’ll cut straight to the point. My uncle, Donald Trump, is already spending BIG to prop up his rubber-stamp candidates like ex-NFL reporter Michele Tafoya, who just launched her campaign against Angie — and he has a $300 million war chest at his fingertips. = | | = Here’s what you need to know about this race, folks: 🔴 Fox News is calling Minnesota’s U.S. Senate race one of the TOP races that could decide the majority. That puts a MAJOR target on Angie’s back. 🔴 Trump’s super PACs raised hundreds of millions last year — and the National Republican Senatorial Committee raised over $88 million — to launch attacks against Democrats like Angie. 🔴 MAGA’s top pick , Michele Tafoya, entered the race — and she’s nothing more than a mouthpiece for the worst of their agenda. 🔴 Experts now say Minnesota is a TOSS-UP. That means every dollar could be the difference between a Senate seat won and a Senate seat lost. Angie’s ready to take BACK our majority from the extremists who are running our country into the ground, stand up to the GOP’s endless corruption, and be the fighter Minnesotans need in Washington. But she won’t be able to stand up to the MAGA movement’s relentless attacks without a whole lot of grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Angie Craig will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for everything, Dr. Mary L. _**But I’ve also watched him make real sacrifices for something bigger. **_ The long nights at the Capitol, the missed dinners, the weekends away fighting for families across Georgia. Greg’s the kind of man who couldn’t sit still while our daughters’ sports and locker rooms were under threat – **_so he authored and passed the Riley Gaines Act to keep men out of women’s sports and protect girls across our state._** Greg saw parents losing control of their children’s education — **so he championed the _Georgia Promise Scholarship_ to give every kid a real chance, no matter their ZIP code. ** **And when it mattered most, Greg stood strong with President Trump, defending election integrity and fighting for the values that make America great.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, ... I promise, I wouldn’t normally message you, but this couldn’t wait a second longer. My name is Natalie Dolezal, and for the last 18 years, I’ve been blessed to be Greg’s wife and the mother of our four beautiful children — Naomi, Lincoln, Norah, and Neeva. Our home in Forsyth County is filled with faith, laughter, bedtime prayers, and the everyday joy of raising a family. Greg has always been our steady rock — the dad who makes time to be there for our kids’ games and activities, lead family devotions, and show them what it means to love God and serve others. But I’ve also watched him make real sacrifices for something bigger. The long nights at the Capitol, the missed dinners, the weekends away fighting for families across Georgia. Greg’s the kind of man who couldn’t sit still while our daughters’ sports and locker rooms were under threat – so he authored and passed the Riley Gaines Act to keep men out of women’s sports and protect girls across our state. Greg saw parents losing control of their children’s education — so he championed the Georgia Promise Scholarship to give every kid a real chance, no matter their ZIP code. And when it mattered most, Greg stood strong with President Trump, defending election integrity and fighting for the values that make America great. I’ve seen the late nights, the tough fights, and the quiet moments when he comes home exhausted but never defeated —because he knows he’s fighting for our kids and yours. I’ve stood by my husband for 18 years... ...I’ve seen every sacrifice and every good he’s done for families across Georgia. Now, with so much at stake in this race for Lieutenant Governor, my question to you is urgent: ? If you don’t step up right now, the Radical Left will keep coming after everything we hold dear... ...Our daughters’ sports, our parental rights, our secure elections, and the safe, free future our children deserve. We risk losing the ground we’ve fought so hard to protect without strong leaders like my husband leading the way. Greg is ready to fight harder than ever in the Lt. Governor’s office, but he needs you in his corner ASAP. This fight won’t wait. With all my love and gratitude, Natalie Dolezal PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DOLEZAL FOR GEORGIA | | 6505 Shiloh Road, Suite 200, Alpharetta, GA, 30005

name: Team Hong
subject: They’re getting desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong
body:
Two manufactured attacks in one week
# [](https://francescahong.com?refcode=em20260428-2765)
Peter,
The attacks on Fran are getting weirder — and that means we’re winning.
[Last week](https://act.francescahong.com/go/11538?t=1&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ), Republican operatives — including a Trump advisor — accused her of wearing a “satanic” hat. The “666” they spotted? Three Gs her son George scribbled on her hat with a marker when he was first learning to write his name.
[](https://act.francescahong.com/go/11538?t=2&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ)
A few days later, they dug up a $25 donation Fran made in 2020 to a Democratic Assembly candidate running against a Republican incumbent. Why now? Because that former candidate posted something awful online last week — and the right-wing media decided Fran should answer for it, five years later. The post was idiotic, and so was the attack.
It’s a classic tactic. Manufacture outrage. Force the candidate to respond. Waste everyone’s time. Repeat.
We’re not playing.
Here’s what’s actually happening:
* Fran is still leading the Democratic primary and growing her supporter base every day.
* Our volunteer team has grown to over 3,000 strong! No other candidate else has this much enthusiasm around their campaign.
* We’re showing up in every corner of the state to collect signatures and get on the ballot.
* And we’re doing it without a dime of corporate PAC money.

We have the broadest base. We have the best policies. And we have the most momentum behind us — which is exactly why they’re throwing everything they’ve got (and what they’ve got, frankly, is weak sauce.)
Let them keep attacking hats and digging in the trash heap of history. We’ll keep fighting for permanent affordability for working people in Wisconsin.
**[So tonight, instead of $2 Tuesday, we’re making it $25 Tuesday.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260428.vU0oQc&refcode=em20260428-2765&t=3&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ)**
**[Chip in $25 to help us fight back.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260428.vU0oQc&refcode=em20260428-2765&t=4&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260428.vU0oQc&amount=5&refcode=em20260428-2765&t=23&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ)**
With gratitude,
Team Hong
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_fh_footer?refcode=em20260428-2765&t=24&refcode2=2765_105371_OlApqJ&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ)**
---
Email us: [info@francescahong.com](mailto:info@francescahong.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most powerful tools that grassroots campaigns like ours have to reach everyday people across Wisconsin and beyond, so thank you for reading to the end.
The more people who engage with our emails, the more likely we’ll go straight to your inbox. For a free and easy way to help our campaign, please [click this link to our website](https://francescahong.com/) after you finish reading our emails.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.francescahong.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2765%2E105371%2EOlApqJ)

subject: Senator Britt is at her desk and asking for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
YOU are the boss, and we need you to start acting like it.

| | | Peter, It’s half past eight. I just got off a late-night call with Senator Britt. She walked me through the Left’s 2026 playbook, and I’m going to be blunt:**It is a gut-punch.** Schumer and the radical Left aren't trying to win an argument anymore. They’re trying to rig the scoreboard.
---
[**VIEW THE 2026 PLAYBOOK**](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=ff133f9a197c44c5beeb6dc09b27b547&_e=k0XbfZ3QY57hyzli67fNndUvh7E0eABS4q_HyX3w3m0sknwI0Y86QniDUvHTl8tKcmGUgHK7EQB7ms8iBEBDOdHV3sm_aoq1KWB4ju08SBUnoAOlC_9W5klyatEN3rIcJLo1e6C08zm6w5cjk0iFdq6vTU9RbnMBOEoPwE6Y-ooqCABJK4o4Mmo05e9NJOaN2xDndSI0M5TeJCicF2sYYrpDrLW4oNuDn2qr8VXYYG-iWsosUM0MWXm6XF4ZGNqLqA9MW5-Xa6scQpy7aSjxR9dINQCHM-x8zCSF5YiOkA1YuQngqCPSldNBz3IyQ77OfRpGmxYj7rGtPKDjRvf0RAu0lFK7TlfaOUbXIot8WEY0qP0PjZ6f08-0yY7Z_eFt0FvLVCf-hSO9FVKOYGFXXGGIrB8zK5yCtEUu8DUz6asIZ1z-MVvJeHEoDzkfJRRfDG5oP8POZqL4qgXgV4PP4nri800woDSKSXT5D3OckZeDTyzVdD1bmAO9dJCAdQERvvr-QvqRNOD2wMiYxEMQEXbzQ4YetG_PqmbYymEkQRASIMz4W0MNEkmwPekyxsiYVoRtQVWlDuHHa4KOJLhZ_YHymX_eChEwfq5IETEmGxtdeGNKNmfhdblmeikyUsVLL72grQ3uFNoNMDoW4h88rYjbu2TgnHMw5z9SAVvmTAv-ZaLqmsve2TKdHznrmlzN_JKzN_XiyWZeSRYEsGRJlLA5upY3Xza4QNVCldRfru4IVufx-7FKpvOAKb8Bqsym0Yy1TqhctSz5QcYWW9_Yu-18lRoisltlbiDmvKITMzARiGDSuhTe2LSp9ZsBA0kicvzp2gGXv1JY2A-c8jN02IiqTxON5zMmHSs5KjfA8QivEw81Gz4OPDRBwpt9jBvHBDPs_q-ZNATxmj7RT_T03w%3D%3D)

clean_body: Each month brings new challenges. | | | Friend, Each month brings new challenges. In April, we watched Trump’s incompetence and lawlessness start a costly, illegal war in Iran, all while American families can’t afford healthcare. We’ve watched Trump pressure the Supreme Court to gut the 14th Amendment, which is personal to so many in our community, including myself. My family’s story—like so many across this country—is rooted in the promise of America. A promise that if you contribute, if you believe in something bigger than yourself, you belong. That’s why I take these attacks on our democracy so seriously. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Can I count on you? —Doris Matsui As a Member of Congress, Doris works to ensure that the voices of her district’s constituents are heard in Congress, and fights for the needs of the Sacramento region. Paid for by Matsui for Congress

We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2154%2E259176%2EC4yxlH) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2154%2E259176%2EC4yxlH)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10934?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.28_Cooper-Evergreen_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2154%2E259176%2EC4yxlH) Peter, At the end of this message, I’m going to ask you to [**make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10934?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.28_Cooper-Evergreen_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2154%2E259176%2EC4yxlH) But first, will you let me explain why your support is so important? Frankly, running for Senate wasn’t part of the plan. I wanted to serve North Carolina from right here at home. Seeing all of the chaos coming out of Washington, DC, I knew I had to do something. Folks had placed their trust in me throughout my career as a public servant to fight for them – and **I felt that responsibility deeply.** This is a race I simply could not walk away from. It’s also one I know we can win. Since launching our campaign, tens of thousands of people have joined our grassroots movement. I’m so grateful to count you as one of them, Peter. **With a recent poll showing this race statistically tied, and far-right Republicans spending millions to defeat me, I need your help to keep up our momentum.** [**Your contribution of $10 split between our campaign and Blue Amp Action will be put to work immediately to help us win in North Carolina and take back the Senate. subject: The vibes are intense.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan
body:
🐾 WOOF! Bailey the campaign dog here with an important update from Team Haley HQ.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PwzirzOXv_sDrrtpuwJQbHYSd9DN067YIPgp-bnYvmQ?) for more
---
# [The vibes are intense. ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=195798573&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1Nzk4NTczLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc0MjI3ODgsImV4cCI6MTc4MDAxNDc4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._0GdVOrs3uk8r58IoH6fPJWgrVWjKbabpKEMQlmOkf0)
### 🐾 WOOF! Bailey the campaign dog here with an important update from Team Haley HQ.
Apr 29
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..yIGBvU-WLz6ALAIjdM2N9o4dBbKCVqpF_7eVjgpOtqc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/the-vibes-are-intense?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

**WOOF WOOF!! It 's me! Bailey, the official campaign dog for Haley Stevens! 🐶💙**
I'm a certified good girl, treat enthusiast, floor-based napper, and proud emotional support animal for the entire Team Haley pack. 🦴✨
My mom, Katelyn, is Haley Stevens' finance director, and I'm barking at you with an update, because my mom and the human people are being ... how do I put this ... suuuper intense.
There are SO many laptops. Coffee cups. Spreadsheets. They keep saying things like "end-of-month numbers" and "two-day window" and "close the fundraising gap."
And I'm like, wow. Y'all. The vibes are intense.
Everybody needs a walk. Maybe we all nap for 12 to 14 hours a day? Maybe we get new chew toys? Or embrace the healing power of finding a recently dropped Coney dog?
But apparently, the humans are saying this is a very important time!!!
**[Because Team Haley has an end-of-month deadline in two days, and they're trying to hit a goal of $200,000 to keep this campaign's momentum going strong.](https://substack.com/redirect/8d61dd0a-5752-46b7-bb1d-3cbc0f729677?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
And yes, I know what you're thinking: "Bailey, for real for real, how much do you actually understand about campaign finance?"
To which I say: Not much!! I'm a dog!! I literally eat food off the floor!! 🐾
But I _do_ know a few things: **I know Michigan is a doggone HUGE race, and Senate control could be decided here.**
I know the polls are looking good for Haley - I keep hearing the humans say things like, "She's the strongest Democrat in the race" and all that stuff. And I know that when Team Haley starts moving around fast and typing loud, the stakes are real.
I also know this: Michiganders are PAWESOME, and Haley works her tail off for them.
**Honestly, her hustle makes me tired, and I have twice as many legs!**
The doggone truth is that Haley loves Michigan more than I love a dropped slice of Buddy's pizza. And humans, let me just say, you know I'm a dog, and I do not know how to lie: **THAT IS LOVE. 🍕👀**
And from where I'm laying - usually under my mom's desk - I can tell this campaign has real momentum. Judging purely by the number of pets I've gotten at campaign events, I'd say this campaign has a lot of people excited for Haley to get to work in the Senate!
That's why the Team Haley humans are so focused on this end-of-month goal.
**Because this campaign, unfortunately, cannot run on a dog 's love (rude). It needs dollars, aka human money.**
And since Haley doesn't have a bunch of weird, dogless, MAGA billionaire backers, it's up to humans like you to help! So before I return to my very demanding schedule of searching for treats, going person to person looking for pets, and interrupting Zoom calls, I wanted to ask one small favor:
**[If you're able to chip in a few bucks before the end-of-month deadline in two days, that would be paws-itively amazing.](https://substack.com/redirect/8d61dd0a-5752-46b7-bb1d-3cbc0f729677?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 🐾💸
No pressure, obviously! As a dog, I have no sense of money and my main job is chasing squirrels!!
But my mom tells me every donation helps keep this campaign moving, and I trust her because she is my everything. Also, she's Haley's finance director, so you should probably listen to her.
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/8d61dd0a-5752-46b7-bb1d-3cbc0f729677?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Okay, gotta go now!!! I just heard the wrinkle of some takeout paper down the hall, and it is critical that I investigate immediately.
You're the best!
Face licks and tail wags,
**Bailey** 🐶
Official Team Haley Campaign Dog
Unofficial Good Girl
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/019b2cd6-5675-4f60-bf02-a0bdf144a35d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/8d61dd0a-5752-46b7-bb1d-3cbc0f729677?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan.

33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009

$4, friend.
You read that right.
That's what I'm asking you to donate to my campaign, since there’s only one day left for us to close the gap on our $100,000 public filing deadline goal - our biggest fundraising deadline yet in Colorado's governor's race. _[Can I count on you to chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130356451/617499041/-1522943465?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=4&refcode=jtk1259-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDRkNzgzYi02MzQzLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbzStdRxtik0RvvCYnF5B5eGLWUeoXZEIuq8vla-lxk=)_
Now, I know $4 might seem like a drop in the bucket, and I can't argue with that.

Your support is what funds this campaign. Reaching major fundraising targets like the one tomorrow night is how we'll keep expanding our footprint in all 64 counties across the state – and it's the only way we'll have the cash reserves to compete in the general election, when national Republican super PACs will _really_ start flooding the race with dark money to defeat me.

Friends, **Arizona is ground zero for the 2026 election fight.** Republican billionaires are pouring money into the state, Trump is flying in to try and rally his base, and Turning Point USA is scrambling to put together a ground game. The GOP is throwing everything it can think of at AZ Democrats. That’s because Trump’s agenda is deeply unpopular. Families are sick of rising costs, tired of the horrific stories from ICE detention centers, and fed up with the chaos in D.C. Arizonans are ready for bold Democratic leadership — but we have to be able to respond to the GOP’s attacks. We need to make sure we have a strong grassroots foundation throughout the state to make sure every voter has the information they need to see through the Republicans’ lies. name: HELP TRUMP
subject: It was the perfect day until…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I was reminded that our mandatory deadline is here.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**__**Friend,
It was the perfect day at Mar-a-Lago until...
**My team walked up to me and shared some bad news:**

[READ TRUMP LETTER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**_[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_****_“President Trump, we hate to interrupt you but your mandatory fundraising deadline is here and you're still short of your goal.”_** **__**
These goals determine whether we have the American people's support to continue our mission of Making America Great Again.
Our Congressional Majority is on the line this November and we cannot let it slip from our fingers.
__But there is good news_ : _my team was able to dig up your email. They told me that you’ve been with me through everything - the fake news, the witch hunts, and you’ve supported me all the way up until this moment. You will help us win this fight! **_[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
We're in the final **48 HOURS** of this critical end-of-month deadline.
**_[Will you be a PATRIOT and make a personal sacrifice today to help me reach my end-of-month fundraising goal? If we’re going to hold our Congressional majority, we must build up the TRUMP WARCHEST NOW.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[Friend’S PERSONAL CONTRIBUTION LINK >>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you for your support!
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: Enough is enough—an update from Reagan Dunn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
You deserve accountability. Help me demand it. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=6de8808441&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c6efff3eeed6/we-did-it-10148067?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=ec3876513a&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

I am reaching out to you with an important update about your taxpayer dollars.
* **Recently** , [a series of reports and investigations](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=1a08120144&e=77eef70c61) have confirmed serious problems with how public dollars were managed. These investigations stem from my work to demand an Audit of King County DCHS funding years ago.
* **Then** , a joint report by the County Auditor and Ombuds outlined significant financial risks and made recommendations to strengthen King County's financial security.
* **Now** , a forensic review of the King County Regional Homelessness Authority (KCRHA) has uncovered significant financial mismanagement of taxpayer dollars.

_**You deserve accountability. [Help me demand it!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=d23f3371aa&e=77eef70c61)**_
Friend, as unacceptable as these findings are, they are unfortunately not a bit surprising. I first pointed out the failures of the KCRHA model all the way back in 2019, and [wrote an Op-Ed](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=2f5b3df65b&e=77eef70c61) in the Seattle Times calling for King County to separate from the failed system years ago.

_Enough is enough._ That's why I've been leading the charge for real reforms to solve each of the problems mentioned above.
* **Recently** , the King County Council unanimously passed my legislation to reform our grant funding processes.
* **Then** , I co-sponsored legislation to create an independent Inspector General Division with the authority to investigate fraud, recover misspent dollars, and finally bring real accountability to county government.
* **Now** , I'm working to pass legislation to pull King County out of the disastrous KCRHA entirely.

This is my focus: identifying waste, demanding accountability, and making sure government actually delivers results for the people paying for it (YOU).

But I can't do this work alone. _I need your help._**Would you be willing to[make a one-time contribution of $25, $35, or even $75](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=6464eac18a&e=77eef70c61) to help me ****_amplify the message_** that taxpayer dollars need to be protected from waste, misuse, and abuse? \--------------------
**[DONATE NOW](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=616fe57d52&e=77eef70c61)**
\-------------------- Friend, your support over the years has meant the world to me, and you inspire me to keep fighting for you!

Thank you!
Reagan Dunn

---
| | [Follow on Twitter](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=18cdda5788&e=77eef70c61) | [ on Facebook](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=39504346e8&e=77eef70c61) |
---

P.O. Box 40417
Bellevue, WA 98015
Email: [info@reagandunn.com](mailto:info@reagandunn.com) |

name: Mandela Barnes for Governor
subject: How impactful is $3 really?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
It all adds up
| If you knew that your $3 would send Mandela Barnes to Madison, where he'll take on corporate greed and fight for working people, wouldn't you make that contribution immediately? If you knew that your $3 contribution could be the difference between a defender of Wisconsinites or a MAGA loyalist winning this tight race, wouldn't that be worth it? And if you knew that your $3 will help ensure that Mandela has the resources to take on Tom Tiffany and his dark money groups, wouldn't you chip in? Mandela is rejecting ALL corporate PAC money, which means he is counting on you. And the stakes of this race are simply too high for us to come up short. That is why we need to ask: **[Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mandela Barnes today? name: Juan Ciscomani
subject: Delivering for Those Who Served 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=62c2042cd2&e=659fba240e)
---
| Hi friend, Juan here–

We've been putting in work for our Veterans, and I am excited to share the latest updates!

Serving those who served our country is not optional. It’s a responsibility. Here in AZ-06, we take that responsibility seriously. **Our district is home to over 80,000 Veterans,_ranking 9th in the nation in Veteran population._**

These are our neighbors and friends, and they deserve to be heard after all of their sacrifices to our country.

And that’s exactly what we’ve been focused on delivering.

Since taking office, we’ve helped return **OVER $4 MILLION** directly to Veterans and their families through casework. But we know benefits are useless without access and support. That’s why we’re working to **[expand care for rural Veterans](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=9228e04896&e=659fba240e),** making sure distance doesn’t stand in the way of getting the help they’ve earned. And we’re continuing to push for more awareness and resources around _**mental health and suicide prevention**_ for our service members, because no Veteran should ever feel like they’re facing that battle alone.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| **LEGISLATION THAT DELIVERS**** ** 🇺🇸 We’ve backed that commitment up with action, working on all of the following bills to support our Veterans ✅ **Prioritizing Veterans’ Survivors Act (H.R. 1228)**
Making sure families of Veterans get the benefits they were promised and a direct line to the VA when they need help most. ✅ **Veterans Readiness & Employment Program Integrity Act (H.R. 3579)**
Improving accountability and outcomes in job training programs so Veterans can transition successfully into the workforce. ✅ **Rural Veterans Improved Access to Benefits Act (H.R. 3951)**
Expanding access to disability exams so rural Veterans can get care faster. ✅ **VETS Opportunity Act (H.R. 1458)**
Modernizing the GI Bill and expanding education options for Veterans, Guard, and Reserve members.

We ask a lot of our service members and their families. The least we can do is to make sure they are supported when they come home. Helping them transition back into civilian life, find jobs, get an education, and ensure they have access to the mental and physical care that they need.
---
|
---
|
---
| **THANK YOU** to all of our Veterans in AZ-06! It is an honor to serve you.

See you around the district!

– Juan
---

That’s why we’re working to , making sure distance doesn’t stand in the way of getting the help they’ve earned. And we’re continuing to push for more awareness and resources around mental health and suicide prevention for our service members, because no Veteran should ever feel like they’re facing that battle alone. | | | LEGISLATION THAT DELIVERS 🇺🇸 We’ve backed that commitment up with action, working on all of the following bills to support our Veterans ✅ Prioritizing Veterans’ Survivors Act (H.R. 1228) Making sure families of Veterans get the benefits they were promised and a direct line to the VA when they need help most. ✅ Veterans Readiness & Employment Program Integrity Act (H.R. 3579) Improving accountability and outcomes in job training programs so Veterans can transition successfully into the workforce. ✅ Rural Veterans Improved Access to Benefits Act (H.R. 3951) Expanding access to disability exams so rural Veterans can get care faster. ✅ VETS Opportunity Act (H.R. 1458) Modernizing the GI Bill and expanding education options for Veterans, Guard, and Reserve members. We ask a lot of our service members and their families. The least we can do is to make sure they are supported when they come home. Helping them transition back into civilian life, find jobs, get an education, and ensure they have access to the mental and physical care that they need. | | | THANK YOU to all of our Veterans in AZ-06! It is an honor to serve you. See you around the district! – Juan | "JOIN ME IN DEFENDING AZ-06" | | | PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS | | | | | Copyright © 2026 Ciscomani for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | This is a moment to channel outrage into action. And that is exactly how the Fair Fight team continues to defend democracy against the rise of autocracy. I founded Fair Fight to advance voting rights after the 2018 election because, after seeing widespread voter difficulties in that year’s elections, I wasn’t willing to sit back. I knew we needed a new organization laser-focused on ensuring that every eligible voter can register to vote, cast their ballot, and have it counted. Now, as Trump and his MAGA Republican allies scheme to install one-party rule in America by silencing voters — with voter suppression laws, election takeover attempts, gerrymandering, intimidation, and more — we don’t sit back. We fight back. And Fair Fight accomplishes this work with strength, energy, and precision, tailored to the places where they can achieve the most impactful victories for free and fair elections. On Sunday, I was honored to join Fair Fight for a virtual event with two Democracy Champions they’ve endorsed in next month’s Georgia Supreme Court elections, Miracle Rankin and Jen Jordan.
Miracle and Jen are enormously impressive legal minds and tenacious fighters for our freedoms. We need their voices on the bench as the Georgia Supreme Court is poised to make pivotal decisions about our rights and our elections.
**Even while Fair Fight races to get out the vote by Georgia’s May 19 election, they’re also building up strength to elect more Democracy Champions up and down the ballot in the rest of 2026.[But they need this team’s help as they continue ramping up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130356827/617514290/-1370916003?refcode=emm_ff_20260428_T1_SYAEOM_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUzZGEwNi02NzQzLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=orbjJjBsPa4rp7d8o2dUSmOT8TQ5-_ATfdCAmse0w5g=)**
Fair Fight knows how to protect democracy on the front lines — at the state level — by strategically investing in races where they can thwart the MAGA takeover.
Fair Fight has a full to-do list for the 2026 elections. With this movement’s support, there is a real path to...
* **Re-elect Senator Jon Ossoff,** building on the record turnout Fair Fight helped build in 2020 and 2021.
* **Flip the State House from red to blue** , which requires 10 pickups — fewer than Democrats achieved in 2018. Fair Fight already helped flip one State House seat last year.
* Win **critical statewide and local elections** that determine who oversees elections.
* Support **Scott Colom’s U.S. Senate campaign in Mississippi** and other mission-aligned candidates across the South to continue building power — after helping last year to break the Republican supermajority in the Mississippi State Senate and flip nine key local seats.

**The team at Fair Fight is ready to apply a proven model of targeted, timely outreach and voter protection to build real pro-voter political power. They will press forward for free and fair elections — no matter what.**
[**But this model requires ongoing support from dedicated activists. And Fair Fight still needs to hit their April grassroots fundraising goal to help power the fight for the rest of the year and beyond. So I need to ask: Will you make a donation of any amount by Thursday’s deadline to help fuel this pro-democracy work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130356828/617514291/-1370916003?refcode=emm_ff_20260428_T1_SYAEOM_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUzZGEwNi02NzQzLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=orbjJjBsPa4rp7d8o2dUSmOT8TQ5-_ATfdCAmse0w5g=)
Thank you,
Stacey Abrams

name: STAND WITH FLORIDA! (via VPP)
subject: Trump is trying to RIG the midterms.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
MAGA’s number one rule: If you can’t win, cheat.
| **This is MAGA’s number one rule: If you can’t win, cheat.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fl-redistrict?source=VPP_20260428_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=6&akid=24062%2E878179%2Eq1gcnL) | [ADD MY NAME: SAVE FLORIDA FROM MAGA REDISTRICTING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fl-redistrict?source=VPP_20260428_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=7&akid=24062%2E878179%2Eq1gcnL)
---
_This is one of the most UNABASHED attempts at a power grab that we’ve EVER seen._

But we know that MAGA is terrified by Democrats’ momentum. Republicans have been **_HUMILIATED_** in every election since Trump came back to power.

[So instead of changing their policies, Republicans are trying to change the maps. That’s why we’re URGENTLY rounding up Democrats who will join us in this must-win fight to protect not just Florida, but our democracy at LARGE. Will you add your name to stand with Florida and STOP their redistricting steal? We need 15,000 signatures by midnight »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fl-redistrict?source=VPP_20260428_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=8&akid=24062%2E878179%2Eq1gcnL)

We need all hands on deck.
— The Voter Protection Project
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=24062%2E878179%2Eq1gcnL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=24062%2E878179%2Eq1gcnL).**

name: Mike Rogers
subject: I thought long and hard before sending this to you, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate

[**But I wrote a personal note anyway... and it’s for you. name: The Democrats
subject: We want to include you on this month’s report
body:
---
Derek, ** We’re rapidly approaching our next end-of-month fundraising deadline. **After this deadline passes, we’re required to report how much we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received this month.** And as Election Day gets closer and closer, everyone will be paying _even more_ attention to our monthly reports. Donald Trump and his billionaire allies will be looking closely to see how much grassroots support Democrats have going into the midterms, and it’s more important than ever that we prove Democrats have the power to win this year. This is your opportunity to show them there is powerful, widespread opposition to their destructive agenda. **Derek: If you pitch in today, your name will appear on our report, alongside thousands of other Democratic supporters across the country who are committed to electing Democrats up and down the ballot and placing a massive check on Trump’s power this year.** [**If this goal is important to you, we’re asking you to rush $7 to the DNC before our end-of-month deadline so we can show Republicans that the American people are on our side, and that we’re prepared to fight and win at the ballot box this year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260428_6913_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6913_22930333_1E8wab&akid=6913%2E22930333%2E1E8wab) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260428_6913_fr&refcode2=6913_22930333_1E8wab&akid=6913%2E22930333%2E1E8wab)**

name: John Donisi, Team Gina
subject: I wanted to step in here real quick to share how hard Gina is working right now
body:
You help make this possible, Peter.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Hi Peter, it’s Gina’s husband, John.
Before I say anything, I just want to say how proud I am of Gina and how grateful I am for this team. The volunteers, the supporters, the people showing up every day, the grassroots supporters — _all of you make this possible._
Right now, I’m stepping in for a moment because Gina and her team are on the phones right now, pushing hard to hit our **$100,000 fundraising goal.**
[**If you can, will you chip in $5 right now to help the team close the gap and hit their fundraising goal by Thursday?**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260428_3_john.hzoPcH&refcode=em20260428-1017&amount=5&t=1&akid=1017%2E299639%2EfaS4vS)
Gina is working day in and day out on this campaign, but she’s not slowing down. She’s been traveling across Texas and talking with families about what their issues are and what they deserve from their next governor.
She’s not running to climb the political ladder, Peter, she’s running because she believes Texas should work for the people who live here — not the billionaires and special interests who have bought their way into Texas through the way of Greg Abbott’s office.
I’ve watched Gina spend years showing up for Texans, defending public schools, standing up for working families, and taking on corruption in Austin. _That is who she is._ And I know there is no better person to replace Greg Abbott after this fall.
And right now, we need the resources to make sure voters hear directly from Gina in these critical months leading up to the election.
**[So, can I count on you to make a donation of $5 before Gina’s fundraising deadline on April 30?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260428_3_john.hzoPcH&refcode=em20260428-1017&amount=5&t=2&akid=1017%2E299639%2EfaS4vS)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260428_3_john.hzoPcH&amount=5&refcode=em20260428-1017&t=21&akid=1017%2E299639%2EfaS4vS)
Thank you for your support. It means a lot to Gina, so it means a lot to me, too.
With gratitude,
John Donisi
Husband, teammate, and proud Texan
[](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260428_3_john.hzoPcH&refcode=em20260428-1017&amount=5&t=22&akid=1017%2E299639%2EfaS4vS)

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260428-5&t=23&refcode2=1017_299639_faS4vS&akid=1017%2E299639%2EfaS4vS)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260428-5&recurring=1&t=24&refcode2=1017_299639_faS4vS&akid=1017%2E299639%2EfaS4vS)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=26&akid=1017%2E299639%2EfaS4vS)

Pol. Ad. paid by Gina Hinojosa Campaign

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Melat’s story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats-endorsed candidate Melat Kiros is making waves and
shaking up the political establishment in Denver:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260428-mk.2HQAYk&refcode=em20260428-37721&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37721%2E1203867%2E7qQgdq ]Headline from The Denver Post;'A young Democrat stunned Rep. Diana
DeGette in a party vote. Against the odds, Melat Kiros is gunning for a
primary win: In challnge of veteran congresswoman, 28-year-old says
'Denver Democrats want a fighter''

Melat surged to prominence after defeating 30-year incumbent Rep. Diana
DeGette at the Denver County Democratic Assembly — earning 63% of the vote
and handing Degette her first assembly loss since 1996.

While the assembly doesn’t decide the primary, moments like this don’t
happen by accident. They point to something real: momentum.

A growing number of voters are looking for a different kind of Democrat —
one who’s willing to challenge the status quo and actually fight for
transformative change.

Melat is running to do exactly that. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260428-mk.2HQAYk&refcode=em20260428-37721&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37721%2E1203867%2E7qQgdq ]Help her win with a grassroots
donation now!

She said it herself: “We hear politicians say over and over that we need
bold leadership, progress, and change. We’ve heard this for years.
Decades. But they never deliver.”

She’s running to change that, fueled by the story that got her here.

Melat was born in Ethiopia and raised in Denver after immigrating with her
family as a baby. After college and law school, she was on her way to
build a career as an attorney.

But after speaking out against Israel’s genocide against Palestinians and
law firms’ targeting pro-Palesinian protesters, Melat lost her job — a
turning point that pushed her towards public service and a deeper
commitment to reforming a political system she believes isn’t working for
everyday people.

Today, when she’s not on the campaign trail, she works as a barista, so
she knows firsthand what it’s like to be a service industry worker at a
time when working-class folks are struggling to get by as corporate
profits soar.

Melat’s campaign is centered on bold, structural change, focusing on:

* Medicate for All;
* Universal childcare;
* Publicly financed elections to reduce the influence of big money.

And she’s prepared to hold her own party accountable to deliver, which is
exactly why Justice Democrats is proud to support her.

But taking on a longtime incumbent backed by the establishment means Melat
needs a surge of grassroots support to keep building on her momentum and
stay competitive. That’s where you come in,
Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260428-mk.2HQAYk&refcode=em20260428-37721&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37721%2E1203867%2E7qQgdq ]Will you split a contribution to Justice Democrats and Melat’s campaign
before Thursday’s fundraising deadline? Every dollar will help us continue
organizing, reaching voters, and amplifying her message ahead of the
primary.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260428-mk.2HQAYk&refcode=em20260428-37721&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37721%2E1203867%2E7qQgdq ]Contribute $5

Melat has proven she can build momentum — it’s up to all of us to help her
sustain it.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260428-37721-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37721_1203867_7qQgdq&akid=37721%2E1203867%2E7qQgdq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37721%2E1203867%2E7qQgdq

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Melat is running to do exactly that. [ ]Help her win with a grassroots donation now! She said it herself: “We hear politicians say over and over that we need bold leadership, progress, and change. We’ve heard this for years. Decades. But they never deliver.” She’s running to change that, fueled by the story that got her here. Melat was born in Ethiopia and raised in Denver after immigrating with her family as a baby. After college and law school, she was on her way to build a career as an attorney. But after speaking out against Israel’s genocide against Palestinians and law firms’ targeting pro-Palesinian protesters, Melat lost her job — a turning point that pushed her towards public service and a deeper commitment to reforming a political system she believes isn’t working for everyday people. Today, when she’s not on the campaign trail, she works as a barista, so she knows firsthand what it’s like to be a service industry worker at a time when working-class folks are struggling to get by as corporate profits soar. Melat’s campaign is centered on bold, structural change, focusing on: Medicate for All; Universal childcare; * Publicly financed elections to reduce the influence of big money. And she’s prepared to hold her own party accountable to deliver, which is exactly why Justice Democrats is proud to support her. But taking on a longtime incumbent backed by the establishment means Melat needs a surge of grassroots support to keep building on her momentum and stay competitive. That’s where you come in, Peter. [ ]Will you split a contribution to Justice Democrats and Melat’s campaign before Thursday’s fundraising deadline? Every dollar will help us continue organizing, reaching voters, and amplifying her message ahead of the primary. [ ]Contribute $5 Melat has proven she can build momentum — it’s up to all of us to help her sustain it. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Peter,

In one week, ballots for the June 2nd Primary will begin landing in mailboxes across California. We’re all hands-on-deck, so here’s the latest directly from HQ:
* **The Cook Political Report rates CA-22 a tossup that could decide who controls the House.** This isn't just another congressional race — what happens here matters for the entire country.

* **A Republican Super PAC dropped $1.2 million to prop up David Valadao.** It’s the single largest ad buy defending a GOP incumbent in California. Last week, we got word that Speaker Mike Johnson's MAGA Super PAC reserved an additional $8 million to protect Valadao.

* **We just went up on the air with ads to win our primary and hold Valadao accountable.** We're aggressively working to expand our reach given the surge in outside spending.

* **Randy is the only candidate in this race refusing corporate PAC money.** This campaign is powered entirely by real people like you.

clean_body: | = Peter, In one week, ballots for the June 2nd Primary will begin landing in mailboxes across California. We’re all hands-on-deck, so here’s the latest directly from HQ: The Cook Political Report rates CA-22 a tossup that could decide who controls the House. This isn't just another congressional race — what happens here matters for the entire country. A Republican Super PAC dropped $1.2 million to prop up David Valadao. It’s the single largest ad buy defending a GOP incumbent in California. Last week, we got word that Speaker Mike Johnson's MAGA Super PAC reserved an additional $8 million to protect Valadao. We just went up on the air with ads to win our primary and hold Valadao accountable. We're aggressively working to expand our reach given the surge in outside spending. Randy is the only candidate in this race refusing corporate PAC money. name: Connor Miller
subject: This is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We can expect the attacks to ramp up fast.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=3184%2E21716%2Eq0oKGX)
Urgent news:
**🚨 The Delaware GOP has officially endorsed its candidate to run against Sarah McBride. 🚨**
Sarah’s had a target on her back from day one. And now, with Delaware Republicans gearing up to try to unseat Sarah, we can expect the attacks to ramp up fast.
**That’s why we’re setting an emergency goal to raise $15,000 before our end-of-month deadline on Thursday, April 30th.**
[**Can you rush a $5 donation toward our goal right now? Your contribution will help us launch rapid-response digital ads, reach voters, and raise the resources we need to stay ahead as outside money pours into this race.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260428-2.qy_SqG&refcode=em20260428-3184&amount=5&t=2&akid=3184%2E21716%2Eq0oKGX)
Delawareans sent Sarah to Congress to fight for our neighbors and deliver for working families, and that’s what she’s focused on.
Sarah has fought back against the Trump administration’s cruel policies and built bridges with anyone willing to make life better for the people of Delaware.
She’s introduced more bipartisan legislation than _any_ new member, secured more than $209 million for Delaware communities, and stayed focused on lowering costs and expanding healthcare — _not the noise._
I know Sarah won't let _anything_ shift her focus from delivering for Delawareans. **It’s up to _us_ to ensure we’re ready to fight back.**
So I’m asking again: [**Can you chip in $5 right now to help us hit our $15,000 emergency goal and keep Sarah’s voice in Congress?** ](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260428-2.qy_SqG&refcode=em20260428-3184&amount=5&t=3&akid=3184%2E21716%2Eq0oKGX)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260428-2.qy_SqG&amount=5&refcode=em20260428-3184&t=22&akid=3184%2E21716%2Eq0oKGX)**
Thank you for having Sarah’s back.
Connor Miller
Campaign Manager
Sarah McBride for Congress

name: Katie Porter
subject: I want to tell you exactly what happened tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41230%2E3422442%2EwbEPNo)
Peter, I just got off the stage after the second debate in this race for governor, and I want to tell you exactly what happened.
This race is coming down to a simple question: _who is actually fighting for Californians, and who is trying to buy their way into power?_
Californians are getting squeezed from every direction—rent that eats half a paycheck, child care that costs more than a mortgage, and wages that just don’t keep up.
**People need solutions, and they deserve to know who’s trying to buy influence in this race.**
Tom Steyer has now poured over $144 million of his own money into his campaign. Others are backed by Big Oil and corporate interests that keep costs high for working families across California.
And the Republicans in this race are still pushing Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda—decimating our rights, denying climate science, and doubling down on the same failed policies that hurt everyday Californians.
I’ve built my career on calling this out clearly, directly, and with receipts. When I bring a whiteboard, it’s because people deserve to see exactly who is funding what, and who benefits.
**As governor, I’ll do the same.**
I don’t take corporate PAC money, I’m not self-funding this campaign, and I’m not here to protect the status quo. I’m here to change it.
**The primary is coming fast, and only the top two candidates move on to November. What we do right now will decide whether we have a real chance to win this race and deliver for working families.**
**[If you’re with me, I’m asking you to chip in today—whatever you can—to help us reach more voters before it’s too late.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260428_2_ak.VgiO2m&refcode=em20260428-41230&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41230%2E3422442%2EwbEPNo)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260428_2_ak.VgiO2m&refcode=em20260428-41230&t=22&akid=41230%2E3422442%2EwbEPNo)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260428-41230&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41230_3422442_wbEPNo&akid=41230%2E3422442%2EwbEPNo)**

name: Mel Tull
subject: 2 days until our EOM deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MEL TULL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
Thursday at midnight is our end-of-month deadline. That's 2 days from now.
I want to be clear about why this deadline matters and what we're building toward.
Every dollar we raise before Thursday determines our May budget. That budget funds the infrastructure we need to flip VA-05:
Digital ads introducing me to voters across the newly drawn district who don't know me yet. We need to reach thousands of voters who just learned they're in the 5th District because of redistricting.
Field organizers knocking doors and having real conversations with voters. VA-05 covers a lot of ground, and we need people on the ground in every community building support.
Voter contact infrastructure — phone banks, text programs, and volunteer coordination — to reach persuadable voters and turn out our base in November.
Campaign literature we can distribute at events, leave at doors, and mail to key precincts.
This is how we build a campaign that can compete and win. But only if we hit our goals.
We set a target to raise before Thursday's deadline. Right now, we're not there yet. And when we fall short, we have to make tough choices about what we can afford and what we have to cut.
I'm not a career politician with corporate PAC money backing me. This campaign is built on grassroots supporters who believe VA-05 deserves better leadership. That's our strength — but it means we need to hit these monthly benchmarks to execute our plan.
2 days left. Thursday at midnight. Chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now and help us reach our EOM goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP US WIN! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
If you’re ready for change, I’d be honored to have your support.
Mel Tull
Candidate for Congress, VA-01
HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]

Henrico, VA 23233

name: SAVE VOTING RIGHTS (via VPP)
subject: The Supreme Court could hand Donald Trump the midterms...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Tell Chief Justice Roberts to do the right thing
| **Friend, the Supreme Court may be about to greenlight MAGA’s wildest voter suppression fantasies.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108177?t=6&akid=23989%2E878179%2EVnUwNJ) [Friend: Add your name now to our viral letter DEMANDING Chief Justice Roberts and the Supreme Court SAVE The Voting Rights Act! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108177?t=7&akid=23989%2E878179%2EVnUwNJ) | [**RUSH $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108177?t=8&akid=23989%2E878179%2EVnUwNJ)
---
TO: Chief Justice John Roberts
FROM: A Proud Democrat
SUBJECT: Protect the Voting Rights Act
_Chief Justice John Roberts,_

I know Donald Trump and Mike Johnson are pressuring you to destroy The Voting Rights Act.

**But at a time when our democracy is already under unprecedented threat,_this would be a disaster_ for the American public.**

Now is the time to restore faith in our democratic system and stand up to those who wish to take complete power for themselves – not make it more vulnerable.

I know Trump sees the end of the Voting Rights Act as another path to holding onto his majorities despite his crashing popularity. **It’s critical you stand against this.**

[That’s why I’m adding my signature and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to make clear my TOTAL opposition to destroying the Voting Rights Act »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108177?t=9&akid=23989%2E878179%2EVnUwNJ) | [**RUSH $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108177?t=10&akid=23989%2E878179%2EVnUwNJ)
---
I ask you to do the right thing,
**X A Proud Democrat**
—The Voter Protection Project
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23989%2E878179%2EVnUwNJ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23989%2E878179%2EVnUwNJ).**

body:
I’m the only Republican in this race who is already doing the work of serving as an executive. I’m the only one ready to turn Oregon around on day one.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,The Republican Primary for Governor is coming down to something pretty straightforward.**Who is ready to do the job, and who can win in November.** I'm the only candidate who can answer both of those questions with a YES. But I need your support to make sure voters across Oregon know that. We're in the home stretch of the Primary Election, and we need the funding to reach more voters before we reach the finish line. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 THIS WEEK. **[Can you chip in right here, right now, to help us get there?](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-y/)** [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-j/) Over the past few years, I've been serving as a Marion County Commissioner, working through the issues that are shaping people's lives right now, mental health, addiction, homelessness, public safety, and affordability. [Donate Today](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-t/) That work doesn't happen from a distance. It requires decisions, follow-through, and accountability.[It's why I've said I'm not trying to learn this role. I'm asking for a promotion in the same line of work.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-i/)The governor's office is an executive job. It calls for someone who understands how systems actually function, how to bring partners together, and how to deliver outcomes people can see.That's the work I've been doing.But this race is also about something bigger.If Republicans are going to win in Oregon, we have to build support beyond our base. That means showing up in every part of the state, listening, and making the case to voters who don't always vote with us. [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-d/) That's exactly how I've approached this campaign.I got in early and have spent months traveling across Oregon, meeting with communities, and having direct conversations about what's working and what isn't.Those conversations have been consistent. People want leadership that is grounded, accountable, and focused on results, not politics.We're now in the final stretch before Election Day on May 19.If you're looking for someone who can step into this role, do the job, and build the kind of support it takes to win statewide, [I'm asking for your support](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-h/).Danielle Bethell
Republican for GovernorP.S. We're just weeks away from Election Day. If you're able, [please make a contribution to help us finish strong.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-k/) [Donate Today](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-x/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-m/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-c/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-q/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-a/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-f/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-z/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-li-ahutdiy-hhlrhljhit-v/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-ahutdiy-l-e)

# [The Great Betrayal: How Augusta's Ruling Class Stopped Working for Maine](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2246936&post_id=195770955&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NzcwOTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc0NTc4MDYsImV4cCI6MTc4MDA0OTgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIyNDY5MzYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MXMpf0WvJC2wVOd2B-_EBBPIvJhiuKGx3A0TMy7R4po)
### By Steve Robinson, Editor-in-Chief, The Maine Wire / RobinsonReport.Substack.com
Apr 29
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2246936&post_id=195770955&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NzcwOTU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzQ1NzgwNiwiZXhwIjoxNzgwMDQ5ODA2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjI0NjkzNiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GbrnXTvYdJfr3U6f7_TAzktYMIBvpM6chns7zvGcvpA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2246936&post_id=195770955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NzcwOTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc0NTc4MDYsImV4cCI6MTc4MDA0OTgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIyNDY5MzYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MXMpf0WvJC2wVOd2B-_EBBPIvJhiuKGx3A0TMy7R4po&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2246936&post_id=195770955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NzcwOTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc0NTc4MDYsImV4cCI6MTc4MDA0OTgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIyNDY5MzYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MXMpf0WvJC2wVOd2B-_EBBPIvJhiuKGx3A0TMy7R4po)
